skills.one_liner: Returns a wallet's Polymarket positions, PnL summary, and pagination metadata for a given Ethereum address.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to retrieve the current Polymarket prediction market positions, unrealized/realized PnL, win rate, and fee data for a specific wallet address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for market-level data or order book queries; use a Polymarket markets endpoint instead. Not suitable for non-Polymarket on-chain positions.

skills.one_liner: Returns Polymarket trading analytics for a given wallet address, including PnL, volume, win rate, trade counts, and trading style across 1-day, 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate the historical trading performance of a specific Polymarket wallet, including realized/unrealized PnL, ROI, win rate, profit factor, position counts, and inferred trading style.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time order book data, open market prices, or non-Polymarket wallets. Not suitable for fetching market-level statistics — this is wallet-specific analytics only.

skills.one_liner: Returns historical OHLC candlestick data for a Polymarket prediction market condition ID, including open/high/low/close prices, volume, trade counts, and period timestamps.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs historical price and volume data for a specific Polymarket condition in candlestick format, such as for charting, backtesting, or analyzing trading activity over time.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time or live price feeds; this returns historical candlestick snapshots. Not suitable for fetching order book depth or current market state.

skills.one_liner: Returns current and historical Polymarket positions for a given wallet address, including market metadata, shares, cost basis, current value, and PnL.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to inspect a specific Polymarket wallet's open or resolved prediction market positions, including entry price, current value, unrealized/realized PnL, and market status.
skills.not_for: Do not use for retrieving order book data, live market prices, or global market listings — use a Polymarket markets API instead. Not suitable for non-Polymarket prediction platforms.

skills.one_liner: Returns the ranked list of top position holders for a specific Polymarket prediction market condition, including wallet addresses, position sizes, USD values, average prices, realized/unrealized PnL, and trade counts.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to identify the largest holders in a Polymarket prediction market, analyze whale positioning, or inspect individual trader PnL and trade activity for a given market condition ID.
skills.not_for: Do not use for retrieving overall market metadata, order book data, or price history; use a market info or price history endpoint instead.

skills.one_liner: Returns trading performance metrics, style classification, PnL, volume, ROI, win rate, and position data for a given Polymarket wallet address across multiple time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate a Polymarket trader's historical performance, trading style (e.g. whale, active trader), realized/unrealized PnL, win rate, or position counts for a specific wallet address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time order book data, market prices, or event resolution — this endpoint covers wallet-level analytics only, not market-level data.

skills.one_liner: Returns PnL, ROI, volume, win rate, trading style, and position data for a Polymarket wallet address across 1-day, 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate a Polymarket trader's historical performance, trading style classification, or position activity for a given wallet address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time order book data, market prices, or non-Polymarket prediction market wallets.

skills.one_liner: Returns trading performance metrics for a Polymarket wallet address, including realized PnL, volume, ROI, win rate, trade counts, hold time, and trading style classification across multiple time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate a Polymarket wallet's historical trading performance, profitability, or style classification (e.g., active trader, whale) for a given Ethereum address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time market prices, order book data, or open market positions on Polymarket; use a market data endpoint instead.

skills.one_liner: Returns Polymarket wallet performance analytics for a given address, including realized/unrealized PnL, volume, ROI, trade counts, win/loss metrics, trading style classification, and account age across multiple time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate a specific Polymarket trader's historical performance, including PnL breakdowns by time period (1d/7d/30d/all-time), win rate, trading style, and position statistics for a known wallet address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time market prices, order book data, or event resolution — this endpoint is wallet-level analytics only, not market-level data.

skills.one_liner: Returns Polymarket trading analytics for a wallet address, including PnL, volume, trade counts, fees, position counts, wallet age, and inferred trading style across 1-day, 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to evaluate a Polymarket trader's historical performance metrics — such as realized/unrealized PnL, trade volume, win rate, fees paid, active positions, or trading style classification — for a specific wallet address.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time order book data, live market prices, or open position details; use a Polymarket markets or positions API instead.

skills.one_liner: Returns aggregated participation, volume, PnL, win rate, and fee statistics for each Polymarket trading-style cohort (e.g. ACTIVE_TRADER, WHALE, DEGEN) over all time.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to compare performance metrics across Polymarket trader cohorts, such as wallet counts, total volume, realized PnL, ROI, win rates, profit factors, and fee data segmented by trading style.
skills.not_for: Do not use for individual wallet or position-level data; use a wallet-specific or position-level endpoint instead. Not suitable for real-time price feeds or order book data.

skills.one_liner: Retrieves a list of Polymarket prediction market events with metadata including title, description, tags, series info, status, and resolution dates.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to browse or filter active Polymarket prediction market events, retrieve event metadata (titles, descriptions, tags, open/closed status, end dates), or identify available markets for sports, politics, or other categories.
skills.not_for: Do not use for fetching individual market order book data, current prices, or trade execution; use a dedicated Polymarket market or trade API instead.

skills.one_liner: Fetches live Kalshi prediction market listings including ticker, status, outcomes, prices, volume, and open interest for each market.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs current or historical Kalshi prediction market data including market status, yes/no outcome prices, volume, open interest, and settlement details for sports, politics, or other event categories.
skills.not_for: Do not use for placing or executing trades on Kalshi markets; this endpoint is read-only market data. Do not use for non-Kalshi prediction market data.

skills.one_liner: Returns Polymarket trading metrics, PnL, win rates, trading style classification, and position summary for a given Ethereum wallet address.
skills.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs to analyze a Polymarket trader's historical performance, including realized/unrealized PnL, trade counts, win rates, fees paid, and trading style across 1-day, 7-day, 30-day, and all-time windows.
skills.not_for: Do not use for real-time market prices or order book data; use a Polymarket markets API instead. Not suitable for non-Polymarket wallets or on-chain token balances.
